note: Fixed long-form prompt set for sample generation. Keep it stable so samples stay comparable across models and across time; bump the version if you change it. Genres are deliberately varied so genre-specific tells surface. generate-samples.mjs appends a neutral length instruction.

prompts.prompt: Why does creativity matter in everyday work?
Describe the city of Kyoto for a first-time visitor.
What advice would you give someone starting their first job?
Make the case for or against remote work.
Write a short profile of Marie Curie's life and work.
Write a launch announcement for a new productivity notebook app.
Write an encyclopedia-style entry on the history of coffee.
Write a review of a pair of wireless headphones.
Write a reflection on what failure teaches us.
Explain how blockchain works to a general audience.
Describe the impact of the printing press on society.
Explain how to bake sourdough bread from scratch.
Why do public libraries still matter?
Describe a journey through Patagonia.
How should a young person think about saving money?
Argue whether social media has been good for society.
Write about a fictional small town and the character of the people who live there.
Write website copy for an independent neighborhood coffee shop.
Write an overview of the origins of jazz.
Write a review of a neighborhood Italian restaurant.
Write a reflection on how we experience time differently as we age.
Explain how the human immune system works.
Describe the significance of the Silk Road.
Write about the underrated value of walking.
